title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: Today’s signal is concentrated in deployment safeguards rather than new governance rules: OpenAI published both a system card for GPT-5.5 Instant and new access controls for cyber use, while also adding a self-harm escalation feature in ChatGPT. A separate policy contribution from Partnership on AI points to continued pressure for clearer provenance and transparency standards around AI-generated media in Europe.

items.title: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.why_it_matters: It shows tighter gated access for high-risk cyber capabilities aimed at verified defensive use.

items.title: OpenAI introduces Trusted Contact in ChatGPT
items.why_it_matters: It adds a product-level intervention for severe self-harm risk, extending safety beyond model refusals.

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant System Card
items.why_it_matters: System cards remain a primary source for model behavior, evaluations, mitigations, and deployment constraints.

items.title: Partnership on AI outlines AI-media transparency recommendations for the EU Code of Practice
items.why_it_matters: It informs emerging standards for provenance, disclosure, and accountability for synthetic media in Europe.

items.title: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT with privacy and labeling safeguards
items.why_it_matters: Ad integration changes incentive and data flows, making privacy boundaries and answer independence safety-relevant.

items.title: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads tools while keeping conversations separate from ads
items.why_it_matters: It further defines operational safeguards around ad targeting, measurement, and conversational privacy.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
